title: Project profile
description: A deterministic selection of capabilities and policies for one project or shared lane, stored as profiles/<profile_id>.json.

profile_id.description: Must match the filename without extension.

target_projects.description: Project names this profile applies to, or ["*"] for every project.

capabilities.description: capability ids (catalog/capabilities/<id>.json). No arbitrary cap: include every relevant, compatible capability.

policies.description: Relative paths under policies/ that apply to this profile.
